name: Possible PetitPotam Coerce Authentication Attempt
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Mauricio Velazco, Michael Haag
SIGMA Title: Possible PetitPotam Coerce Authentication Attempt
SIGMA Description: Detect PetitPotam coerced authentication activity.

False positives:
- Unknown. Feedback welcomed.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5145 AND LOWER("Share Name") LIKE '\\%' AND LOWER("Share Name") LIKE '%\ipc$' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%lsarpc%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%anonymous logon%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Possible PetitPotam Coerce Authentication Attempt on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5145 AND LOWER("Share Name") LIKE '\\%' AND LOWER("Share Name") LIKE '%\ipc$' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%lsarpc%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%anonymous logon%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Possible PetitPotam Coerce Authentication Attempt
